CONTENT.Club career: Matazo made his professional debut for AS Monaco on 27 September 2020 in a Ligue 1 game against RC Strasbourg. On 9 May 2021, he scored his first Ligue 1 goal in a 1–0 away win over Reims.On 1 February 2024, Matazo was loaned by Royal Antwerp until the end of the season.
CONTENT.External links: Profile at the AS Monaco FC websiteEliot Matazo at SoccerwayEliot Matazo at the Royal Belgian Football Association
CONTENT.International career: Matazo was born in Belgium to a Congolese Malagasy father and Kenyan mother. He is a youth international for Belgium, having played up to the Belgium U21s.

SUMMARY: Eliot Matazo (born 15 February 2002) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for  Ligue 1 club Monaco.
